evidence_audit.summary: All detected links stay inside X/Twitter media or tweet pages; no external source document is exposed. The tweet contains claim-like text but does not expose a direct external source for verification.

checks.name: direct_access
checks.evidence: All detected links stay inside X/Twitter media or tweet pages; no external source document is exposed.

checks.name: transparency
checks.evidence: Resolved links point only to tweet media or internal pages instead of a named external source.

checks.name: verifiability
checks.evidence: The tweet contains claim-like text but does not expose a direct external source for verification.

checks.name: intent_signal
checks.evidence: CTA language detected (get it here), which often indicates promotion or funnel behavior rather than transparent sourcing.

suggested_checks: Open the original tweet URL and verify the extracted text matches exactly.
Confirm the captured handle matches the profile shown on the tweet.
Confirm the timestamp and timezone as shown in the original tweet.
If this is part of a thread, verify that replies/continuations were not missed.
Open linked URLs from the tweet and verify referenced claims.
Review resolved link targets and confirm they match what the tweet promises.
Treat media-only links as unverified until you locate a direct external source.
